# Prometheus Operator Least-Privilege Phase 1 Baseline

**Date:** 2026-04-21
**Status:** Baseline evidence for Phase 1 of [Prometheus Operator Least Privilege](../plans/prometheus-operator-least-privilege-plan.md).
**Generated by:** `./scripts/ops/capture-prometheus-operator-phase-1-baseline.sh`

This note captures the current `kube-prometheus-stack` operator RBAC and live authorization evidence before any least-privilege reduction work.

## Baseline Findings

- The current render still emits a single cluster-scoped operator binding: 2 cluster-scoped object(s) and 0 namespaced Role/RoleBinding object(s).
- The operator ClusterRole still grants broad `monitoring.coreos.com` access instead of a read-only split for current CR consumers.
- The operator can mutate `statefulsets.apps`, which matches Prometheus reconciliation in `monitoring` but is not namespaced by the current RBAC layer.
- The operator still has cluster-wide `configmaps` and `secrets` authority.
- The operator still has cross-namespace mutation on `services`, `endpoints`, and `endpointslices`.
- The operator still holds `pods delete`, which is broader than the expected final posture.
- The operator still depends on cluster-scoped reads for `nodes`, `namespaces`, `storageclasses`, and `ingresses`.
- Live `kubectl auth can-i` confirms the service account can operate outside `monitoring`, including `default create servicemonitors.monitoring.coreos.com`, `default create services`, `default create statefulsets.apps`, `default delete pods`.

## Rendered Operator RBAC

Chart render: `83.4.0` from `prometheus-community/kube-prometheus-stack` with `kubernetes/monitoring/prometheus-stack-values.yaml`.

Rendered objects:
- `ClusterRole/prometheus-stack-kube-prom-operator`
- `ClusterRoleBinding/prometheus-stack-kube-prom-operator`

### Rule Summary

| API Groups | Resources | Verbs |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `monitoring.coreos.com` | `alertmanagers, alertmanagers/finalizers, alertmanagers/status, alertmanagerconfigs, prometheuses, prometheuses/finalizers, prometheuses/status, prometheusagents, prometheusagents/finalizers, prometheusagents/status, thanosrulers, thanosrulers/finalizers, thanosrulers/status, scrapeconfigs, scrapeconfigs/status, servicemonitors, servicemonitors/status, podmonitors, podmonitors/status, probes, probes/status, prometheusrules, prometheusrules/status` | `*` |
| `apps` | `statefulsets` | `*` |
| `(core)` | `configmaps, secrets` | `*` |
| `(core)` | `pods` | `list, delete` |
| `(core)` | `services, services/finalizers, endpoints` | `get, create, update, delete` |
| `(core)` | `nodes` | `list, watch` |
| `(core)` | `namespaces` | `get, list, watch` |
| `, events.k8s.io` | `events` | `patch, create` |
| `networking.k8s.io` | `ingresses` | `get, list, watch` |
| `storage.k8s.io` | `storageclasses` | `get` |
| `discovery.k8s.io` | `endpointslices` | `get, create, list, watch, update, delete` |

### Rendered YAML

```yaml
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: prometheus-stack-kube-prom-operator
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: prometheus-stack
    app.kubernetes.io/version: 83.4.0
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: kube-prometheus-stack
    chart: kube-prometheus-stack-83.4.0
    release: prometheus-stack
    heritage: Helm
    app: kube-prometheus-stack-operator
    app.kubernetes.io/name: kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus-operator
    app.kubernetes.io/component: prometheus-operator
rules:
- apiGroups:
  - monitoring.coreos.com
  resources:
  - alertmanagers
  - alertmanagers/finalizers
  - alertmanagers/status
  - alertmanagerconfigs
  - prometheuses
  - prometheuses/finalizers
  - prometheuses/status
  - prometheusagents
  - prometheusagents/finalizers
  - prometheusagents/status
  - thanosrulers
  - thanosrulers/finalizers
  - thanosrulers/status
  - scrapeconfigs
  - scrapeconfigs/status
  - servicemonitors
  - servicemonitors/status
  - podmonitors
  - podmonitors/status
  - probes
  - probes/status
  - prometheusrules
  - prometheusrules/status
  verbs:
  - '*'
- apiGroups:
  - apps
  resources:
  - statefulsets
  verbs:
  - '*'
- apiGroups:
  - ''
  resources:
  - configmaps
  - secrets
  verbs:
  - '*'
- apiGroups:
  - ''
  resources:
  - pods
  verbs:
  - list
  - delete
- apiGroups:
  - ''
  resources:
  - services
  - services/finalizers
  - endpoints
  verbs:
  - get
  - create
  - update
  - delete
- apiGroups:
  - ''
  resources:
  - nodes
  verbs:
  - list
  - watch
- apiGroups:
  - ''
  resources:
  - namespaces
  verbs:
  - get
  - list
  - watch
- apiGroups:
  - ''
  - events.k8s.io
  resources:
  - events
  verbs:
  - patch
  - create
- apiGroups:
  - networking.k8s.io
  resources:
  - ingresses
  verbs:
  - get
  - list
  - watch
- apiGroups:
  - storage.k8s.io
  resources:
  - storageclasses
  verbs:
  - get
- apiGroups:
  - discovery.k8s.io
  resources:
  - endpointslices
  verbs:
  - get
  - create
  - list
  - watch
  - update
  - delete
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: prometheus-stack-kube-prom-operator
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: prometheus-stack
    app.kubernetes.io/version: 83.4.0
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: kube-prometheus-stack
    chart: kube-prometheus-stack-83.4.0
    release: prometheus-stack
    heritage: Helm
    app: kube-prometheus-stack-operator
    app.kubernetes.io/name: kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus-operator
    app.kubernetes.io/component: prometheus-operator
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: prometheus-stack-kube-prom-operator
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: prometheus-stack-kube-prom-operator
  namespace: monitoring
```

## `kubectl auth can-i` Matrix

Service account under test: `system:serviceaccount:monitoring:prometheus-stack-kube-prom-operator`.

| Scope | Verb | Resource | Why This Check Exists | Allowed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `monitoring` | `create` | `services` | Operator-managed Service reconciliation in monitoring | `yes` |
| `monitoring` | `create` | `statefulsets.apps` | Prometheus StatefulSet reconciliation in monitoring | `yes` |
| `monitoring` | `delete` | `endpointslices.discovery.k8s.io` | Operator-managed EndpointSlice cleanup in monitoring | `yes` |
| `monitoring` | `get` | `secrets` | Prometheus config secret access in monitoring | `yes` |
| `monitoring` | `get` | `servicemonitors.monitoring.coreos.com` | Current monitoring CR reads in the owned namespace | `yes` |
| `default` | `create` | `servicemonitors.monitoring.coreos.com` | Baseline check for cross-namespace monitoring CR mutation | `yes` |
| `default` | `create` | `services` | Baseline check for cross-namespace Service mutation | `yes` |
| `default` | `create` | `statefulsets.apps` | Baseline check for cross-namespace StatefulSet mutation | `yes` |
| `default` | `delete` | `pods` | Baseline check for cross-namespace Pod delete | `yes` |
| `default` | `get` | `secrets` | Baseline check for cross-namespace secret reads | `yes` |
| `default` | `get` | `servicemonitors.monitoring.coreos.com` | Current cross-namespace ServiceMonitor reads | `yes` |
| `infrastructure` | `create` | `servicemonitors.monitoring.coreos.com` | Unrelated-namespace monitoring CR mutation baseline | `yes` |
| `infrastructure` | `create` | `services` | Unrelated-namespace Service mutation baseline | `yes` |
| `infrastructure` | `delete` | `pods` | Unrelated-namespace Pod delete baseline | `yes` |
| `infrastructure` | `get` | `secrets` | Unrelated-namespace secret read baseline | `yes` |
| `infrastructure` | `get` | `servicemonitors.monitoring.coreos.com` | Unrelated-namespace monitoring CR read baseline | `yes` |
| `istio-system` | `create` | `services` | Control-plane namespace Service mutation baseline | `yes` |
| `istio-system` | `get` | `secrets` | Control-plane namespace secret read baseline | `yes` |
| `istio-system` | `get` | `servicemonitors.monitoring.coreos.com` | Control-plane namespace monitoring CR read baseline | `yes` |
| `cluster` | `get` | `storageclasses.storage.k8s.io` | Cluster StorageClass read | `yes` |
| `cluster` | `list` | `namespaces` | Cluster namespace discovery | `yes` |
| `cluster` | `watch` | `ingresses.networking.k8s.io` | Cluster Ingress watch | `yes` |
| `cluster` | `watch` | `nodes` | Cluster node watch | `yes` |

## Manual Runtime Follow-Up

Run `./scripts/smoketest/verify-monitoring-runtime.sh` separately after Tilt has brought up the full app stack. Phase 1 still requires that runtime result as evidence, but the capture script no longer blocks on it.
